zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Bushnell Of Horsham於1580年出生在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安時，他的父親Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham30歲，母親Margery26歲。他於1605年5月13日與Ferris Quenell在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年10月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年66歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Bushnell Of Horsham于1580年出生在英国英格兰素可霍沙安时，他的父亲Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham30岁，母亲Margery26岁。他于1605年5月13日与Ferris Quenell在英国英格兰素可霍沙安结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年10月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年66岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Bushnell Of Horsham was born in 1580, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham, was 30 and his mother, Margery, was 26. He married Ferris Quenell on 13 May 1605, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 October 1646, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Bushnell Of Horsham est né en 1580, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ferris Quenell le 13 mai 1605, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1646, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Bushnell Of Horsham 1580 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham 30 und seine Mutter Margery 26. Er hat am 13. Mai 1605 in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Ferris Quenell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1646 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Bushnell Of Horshamが1580年にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムで生まれた時，父Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatchamは30歳，母Margeryは26歳であった。1605年5月13日にイギリスイギリススセックスホールシャムでFerris Quenellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年10月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州にて埋葬された。

ko.Medford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 메드퍼드
ko.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Bushnell Of Horsham(이)가 1580년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1605년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 Ferris Quenell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 10월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bushnell Of Horsham nasceu em 1580, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ferris Quenell em 13 de maio de 1605, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1646, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Bushnell Of Horsham родился в 1580 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ferris Quenell 13 мая 1605 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 октября 1646 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Bushnell Of Horsham nació en 1580, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ferris Quenell el 13 de mayo de 1605, en Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1646, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
